subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Lord! This is Thy servant who hath striven with his spirit, his heart, his soul and his body, until he reached the shore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی سعی بروحه و قلبه و فواده و جسمه حتی ورد علی شاطی
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for spiritual recognition, @humility; meekness; lowliness
